scenes.speech: 学校英语对老师和朋友都用得上加鲁！🏫
scenes.title: 学校英语
scenes.content: 本课学习「学校英语」。上课、课间、教室、图书馆。学校生活能用的表达集中学习。

scenes.title: 学科
scenes.content: math（数学）, science（理科）, English, history（历史）, music（音乐）, P.E.（体育）。从喜欢的学科开始记轻松。
scenes.highlight:
math / science / English
history / music / P.E.

scenes.title: 向老师提问
scenes.content: Excuse me, can I ask a question? I don't understand. 提问的勇气能加倍学习速度。举手后说这句。
scenes.highlight:
Can I ask a question?
I don't understand.

scenes.title: 请求重复
scenes.content: Could you say that again, please? Could you speak slowly? 没听清没关系，再请一次就行。
scenes.highlight:
Could you say that again?
Could you speak slowly?

scenes.speech: 教室工具也用英语试试！
scenes.title: 教室工具
scenes.content: pen, pencil, eraser, notebook, textbook, ruler。练习「Can I borrow your pencil?」也很实用。
scenes.highlight:
pen / pencil / eraser
notebook / textbook / ruler

scenes.title: 作业
scenes.content: What's the homework? I finished my homework. 和朋友确认时直接能用。
scenes.highlight:
What's the homework?
I finished my homework.

scenes.title: 课间
scenes.content: Let's play together! Want to join us? 邀请朋友的话一句，英语聊天伙伴就增加。
scenes.highlight:
Let's play together!
Want to join us?

scenes.title: 考试
scenes.content: The test was hard. I did my best. 比起结果，「我尽力了」是全球通用的鼓励。
scenes.highlight:
The test was hard.
I did my best.

scenes.title: 放学
scenes.content: See you tomorrow! Good job today! 结束一天的问候，对明天再见的朋友传达心意。
scenes.highlight:
See you tomorrow!
Good job today!

scenes.speech: 小测验加鲁！「再说一次」用英语怎么说？
scenes.quizQuestion: 「请再说一次」最礼貌的说法是？
quizChoices: Could you say that again, please?
scenes.quizExplanation: Could you say that again, please?最礼貌自然。please是关键。

scenes.speech: 学校英语大师加鲁！明天就用🌟
scenes.title: 课程完成！
